n8 * List users.n8 * List users with pagination.

7/**7/**
n8 * List users.n8 * List users with pagination driven by `query.page` and `query.limit`.
9 *9 *
n10 * Currently returns every user and ignores any pagination parameters.n10 * `page` is 1-indexed (default 1); `limit` defaults to 10. Numeric strings
11 * (e.g. "2") are coerced to numbers. A page beyond the last returns an
12 * empty `data` array (not an error).
11 *13 *
n12 * @param {{ page?: number, limit?: number }} [query]n14 * @param {{ page?: number|string, limit?: number|string }} [query]
13 * @returns {{ data: Array, page: number, limit: number, total: number, tota15 * @returns {{ data: Array, page: number, limit: number, total: number, tota
>lPages: number }}>lPages: number }}
14 */16 */
15function listUsers(query = {}) {17function listUsers(query = {}) {
t16  return {t
17    data: USERS,
18    page: 1,
19    limit: USERS.length,
20    total: USERS.length,18  const total = USERS.length;
21    totalPages: 1,19  const limit = Math.max(1, Number(query.limit ?? 10) || 10);
22  };20  const totalPages = Math.ceil(total / limit);
21  const page = Math.max(1, Number(query.page ?? 1) || 1);
22  const start = (page - 1) * limit;
23  const data = start >= total ? [] : USERS.slice(start, start + limit);
24  return { data, page, limit, total, totalPages };
23}25}
2426
25module.exports = { listUsers, USERS };27module.exports = { listUsers, USERS };

29

nn1DISCOUNT_RATES = {
2    "vip": 0.10,
3    "member": 0.05,
4}
5 
6 
7def _calculate_subtotal(items):
8    subtotal = 0
9    for item in items:
10        subtotal += item["price"] * item["qty"]
11    return subtotal
12 
13 
14def _apply_customer_discount(subtotal, customer_type):
15    discount_rate = DISCOUNT_RATES.get(customer_type, 0)
16    return subtotal - subtotal * discount_rate
17 
18 
19def _apply_coupon(amount, coupon):
20    if coupon == "SAVE5":
21        return max(amount - 5, 0), False
22    if coupon == "FREESHIP":
23        return amount, True
24    return amount, False
25 
26 
27def _calculate_shipping(amount, free_ship):
28    if free_ship or amount >= 100:
29        return 0
30    return 10
31 
32 
33def _calculate_tax(amount):
34    return amount * 0.08
35 
36 
37def _build_result(subtotal, after_coupon, tax, shipping):
38    total = after_coupon + tax + shipping
39    return {
40        "subtotal": round(subtotal, 2),
41        "discount": round(subtotal - after_coupon, 2),
42        "tax": round(tax, 2),
43        "shipping": round(shipping, 2),
44        "total": round(total, 2),
45    }
46 
47 
1def process_order(items, customer_type, coupon):48def process_order(items, customer_type, coupon):
t2    # compute subtotalt49    subtotal = _calculate_subtotal(items)
3    subtotal = 050    after_discount = _apply_customer_discount(subtotal, customer_type)
4    for it in items:51    after_coupon, free_ship = _apply_coupon(after_discount, coupon)
5        subtotal = subtotal + it["price"] * it["qty"]52    shipping = _calculate_shipping(after_coupon, free_ship)
6 53    tax = _calculate_tax(after_coupon)
7    # figure out discount based on customer type54    return _build_result(subtotal, after_coupon, tax, shipping)
8    if customer_type == "vip":
9        after_discount = subtotal - subtotal * 0.10
10    else:
11        if customer_type == "member":
12            after_discount = subtotal - subtotal * 0.05
13        else:
14            after_discount = subtotal
15 
16    # apply coupon
17    if coupon is not None:
18        if coupon == "SAVE5":
19            after_coupon = after_discount - 5
20            if after_coupon < 0:
21                after_coupon = 0
22            free_ship = False
23        elif coupon == "FREESHIP":
24            after_coupon = after_discount
25            free_ship = True
26        else:
27            after_coupon = after_discount
28            free_ship = False
29    else:
30        after_coupon = after_discount
31        free_ship = False
32 
33    # shipping
34    if free_ship:
35        shipping = 0
36    else:
37        if after_coupon >= 100:
38            shipping = 0
39        else:
40            shipping = 10
41 
42    # tax
43    tax = after_coupon * 0.08
44 
45    # total
46    total = after_coupon + tax + shipping
47 
48    result = {}
49    result["subtotal"] = round(subtotal, 2)
50    result["discount"] = round(subtotal - after_coupon, 2)
51    result["tax"] = round(tax, 2)
52    result["shipping"] = round(shipping, 2)
53    result["total"] = round(total, 2)
54    return result

nn1CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_RATES = {
2    "vip": 0.10,
3    "member": 0.05,
4}
5 
6SAVE5_COUPON = "SAVE5"
7FREESHIP_COUPON = "FREESHIP"
8FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD = 100
9STANDARD_SHIPPING = 10
10TAX_RATE = 0.08
11 
12 
13def _calculate_subtotal(items):
14    return sum(item["price"] * item["qty"] for item in items)
15 
16 
17def _apply_customer_discount(subtotal, customer_type):
18    discount_rate = CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_RATES.get(customer_type, 0)
19    return subtotal - subtotal * discount_rate
20 
21 
22def _apply_coupon(amount, coupon):
23    if coupon == SAVE5_COUPON:
24        return max(amount - 5, 0), False
25 
26    if coupon == FREESHIP_COUPON:
27        return amount, True
28 
29    return amount, False
30 
31 
32def _calculate_shipping(amount, has_free_shipping_coupon):
33    if has_free_shipping_coupon or amount >= FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD:
34        return 0
35 
36    return STANDARD_SHIPPING
37 
38 
39def _round_summary(subtotal, after_coupon, tax, shipping, total):
40    return {
41        "subtotal": round(subtotal, 2),
42        "discount": round(subtotal - after_coupon, 2),
43        "tax": round(tax, 2),
44        "shipping": round(shipping, 2),
45        "total": round(total, 2),
46    }
47

5        subtotal = subtotal + it["price"] * it["qty"]

5    rates = {"vip": 0.10, "member": 0.05}
6    discount_rate = rates.get(customer_type, 0)
7    return subtotal * (1 - discount_rate)
8 
9def apply_coupon(amount, coupon):
10    free_ship = False
11    if coupon == "SAVE5":
12        amount = max(0, amount - 5)
13    elif coupon == "FREESHIP":
14        free_ship = True
15    return amount, free_ship
16 
17def calculate_shipping(amount, free_ship):
18    if free_ship or amount >= 100:
19        return 0
20    return 10
21

nn1# Discount rate applied to the subtotal based on customer type.
2CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_RATE = {
3    "vip": 0.10,
4    "member": 0.05,
5}
6 
7 
8def _subtotal_of(items):
9    """Sum price * qty across all line items."""
10    return sum(it["price"] * it["qty"] for it in items)
11 
12 
13def _apply_customer_discount(subtotal, customer_type):
14    """Subtract the customer-type discount from the subtotal."""
15    rate = CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_RATE.get(customer_type, 0.0)
16    return subtotal * (1 - rate)
17 
18 
19def _apply_coupon(after_discount, coupon):
20    """Apply a coupon code; returns (price_after_coupon, free_ship)."""
21    if coupon == "SAVE5":
22        return max(after_discount - 5, 0), False
23    if coupon == "FREESHIP":
24        return after_discount, True
25    return after_discount, False
26 
27 
28def _shipping_cost(after_coupon, free_ship):
29    """Shipping is free if flagged or the order is at least $100."""
30    if free_ship or after_coupon >= 100:
31        return 0
32    return 10
33 
34

nn1CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_RATES = {"vip": 0.10, "member": 0.05}
2 
3TAX_RATE = 0.08
4SHIPPING_FEE = 10
5FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD = 100
6 
7 
8def _subtotal(items):
9    return sum(it["price"] * it["qty"] for it in items)
10 
11 
12def _apply_customer_discount(subtotal, customer_type):
13    rate = CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_RATES.get(customer_type, 0)
14    return subtotal - subtotal * rate
15 
16 
17def _apply_coupon(amount, coupon):
18    """Return (amount after coupon, whether shipping is free)."""
19    if coupon == "SAVE5":
20        return max(amount - 5, 0), False
21    if coupon == "FREESHIP":
22        return amount, True
23    return amount, False
24 
25 
26def _shipping(amount, free_ship):
27    if free_ship or amount >= FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD:
28        return 0
29    return SHIPPING_FEE
30 
31 
1def process_order(items, customer_type, coupon):32def process_order(items, customer_type, coupon):

26        else:

28            free_ship = False
29    else:
30        after_coupon = after_discount

 >void
35// deadlocks when two transfers move money in opposite directions concurrent
 >ly,
36// accounts are always locked in a consistent order (by name).
35func (b *Bank) Transfer(from, to string, amount int) {37func (b *Bank) Transfer(from, to string, amount int) {
36        f := b.accounts[from]38        f := b.accounts[from]
37        t := b.accounts[to]39        t := b.accounts[to]
tt40 
41        // Same account: nothing to move (net zero), but still lock for cons
 >istency.
42        if from == to {
43                f.mu.Lock()
44                defer f.mu.Unlock()
45                return
46        }
47 
48        // Lock in a consistent order to prevent lock-ordering deadlocks.
49        first, second := f, t
50        if from > to {
51                first, second = t, f
52        }
53 
38        f.mu.Lock()54        first.mu.Lock()
39        defer f.mu.Unlock()55        defer first.mu.Unlock()
40        t.mu.Lock()56        second.mu.Lock()
41        defer t.mu.Unlock()57        defer second.mu.Unlock()
58

43        t.balance += amount60        t.balance += amount

37                del entries[index]

40        if not entries:
41            self._handlers.pop(event, None)

n18    return _match(text, 0, pattern, 0)n18    n = len(pattern)
19    m = len(text)
20 
21    # Precompute character class information for every '[' in the pattern.
22    class_info = [None] * n
23    for pi in range(n):
24        if pattern[pi] == "[":
25            class_info[pi] = _parse_class(pattern, pi)
26 
27    # prev holds dp[i+1][*]; initialize it for the case where no text remain
 >s.
28    prev = [False] * (n + 1)
29    prev[n] = True

31        prev[j] = pattern[j] == "*" and prev[j + 1]
32

34    for ti in range(m - 1, -1, -1):
35        cur = [False] * (n + 1)

38            c = pattern[j]
39            if c == "*":
40                # '*' matches an empty sequence or consumes one character.
41                cur[j] = cur[j + 1] or prev[j]
42            elif c == "?":
43                cur[j] = prev[j + 1]

56                    cur[j] = prev[j + 1]
57        prev = cur
58 
59    return prev[0]

n21def _match(t, ti, p, pi):n21def _match_one(t, ti, p, pi):
22    if pi == len(p):22    """Match the single (non-'*') pattern token at pi against t[ti].
23        return ti == len(t)23

35def _match(t, p):
36    """Greedy two-pointer glob match: O(len(t) * len(p)) worst case.
37 
38    Equivalent to exhaustive backtracking, but records the most recent
39    '*' so a failed branch resumes by letting that '*' swallow one more
40    character instead of recursing exponentially.
41    """
42    ti = pi = 0
43    star_pi = -1
44    star_ti = 0
29    if ti == len(t):45    while ti < len(t):
46        if pi < len(p) and p[pi] != "*":
47            ok, nxt = _match_one(t, ti, p, pi)
48            if ok:
49                ti += 1
50                pi = nxt
51                continue
52        elif pi < len(p) and p[pi] == "*":
53            star_pi = pi
54            star_ti = ti
55            pi += 1
56            continue
57        if star_pi != -1:
58            pi = star_pi + 1
59            star_ti += 1
60            ti = star_ti
61            continue
30        return False62        return False
t31    if c == "[":t63    while pi < len(p) and p[pi] == "*":
32        ok, nxt = _match_class(t[ti], p, pi)64        pi += 1
33        return ok and _match(t, ti + 1, p, nxt)65    return pi == len(p)
34    if c == "?" or c == t[ti]:
35        return _match(t, ti + 1, p, pi + 1)
36    return False

t18    return _match(text, 0, pattern, 0)t18    # Iterative greedy matching with single-point backtracking: on a
19 19    # mismatch, retry from the most recent '*' with it consuming one more
20 20    # character. Every non-'*' element consumes exactly one character, so
21def _match(t, ti, p, pi):21    # this is O(len(text) * len(pattern)).

25        if pi < len(pattern):

27            ti < len(t) and _match(t, ti + 1, p, pi)29                pi += 1
28        )30                continue
29    if ti == len(t):31            if c == "[":
32                ok, nxt = _match_class(text[ti], pattern, pi)
33                if ok:
34                    ti += 1
35                    pi = nxt
36                    continue
37            elif c == "?" or c == text[ti]:
38                ti += 1
39                pi += 1

41        if star_pi < 0:
